meaning: adj.寒冷的,阴冷的,荒凉的,凄凉的,黯淡的,
examples: The outlook for jobs is bleak.
The weather can be quite bleak on the coast.
The future looks bleak for the fishing industry.
It was an otherworldly place: bleak, windswept, and with a landscape dominated by active volcanoes.
Part of the appeal of the often-bleak Maumturks is in their wild, unchanging isolation.
